query:
-- Insert default permissions
INSERT INTO permissions (code, module, action, name, description, category) VALUES
-- Dashboard
('dashboard:view', 'dashboard', 'view', 'View Dashboard', 'Access to main dashboard', 'Dashboard'),
('dashboard:analytics', 'dashboard', 'analytics', 'View Analytics', 'Access to analytics and reports', 'Dashboard'),

-- Users
('users:view', 'users', 'view', 'View Users', 'View user list and details', 'Users'),
('users:create', 'users', 'create', 'Create Users', 'Create new users', 'Users'),
('users:edit', 'users', 'edit', 'Edit Users', 'Edit user information', 'Users'),
('users:delete', 'users', 'delete', 'Delete Users', 'Delete users from system', 'Users'),
('users:assign_role', 'users', 'assign_role', 'Assign Roles', 'Assign roles to users', 'Users'),

-- Groups
('groups:view', 'groups', 'view', 'View Groups', 'View group list and details', 'Groups'),
('groups:create', 'groups', 'create', 'Create Groups', 'Create new groups', 'Groups'),
('groups:edit', 'groups', 'edit', 'Edit Groups', 'Edit group information', 'Groups'),
('groups:delete', 'groups', 'delete', 'Delete Groups', 'Delete groups', 'Groups'),
('groups:manage_members', 'groups', 'manage_members', 'Manage Members', 'Add/remove group members', 'Groups'),

-- Requests
('requests:view_own', 'requests', 'view_own', 'View Own Requests', 'View only own requests', 'Requests'),
('requests:view_group', 'requests', 'view_group', 'View Group Requests', 'View requests from same group', 'Requests'),
('requests:view_site', 'requests', 'view_site', 'View Site Requests', 'View all requests at assigned sites', 'Requests'),
('requests:view_all', 'requests', 'view_all', 'View All Requests', 'View all requests in system', 'Requests'),
('requests:create', 'requests', 'create', 'Create Requests', 'Create new access requests', 'Requests'),
('requests:edit', 'requests', 'edit', 'Edit Requests', 'Edit pending requests', 'Requests'),
('requests:cancel', 'requests', 'cancel', 'Cancel Requests', 'Cancel pending requests', 'Requests'),

-- Approvals
('approvals:view', 'approvals', 'view', 'View Approvals', 'View approval queue', 'Approvals'),
('approvals:approve', 'approvals', 'approve', 'Approve Requests', 'Approve pending requests', 'Approvals'),
('approvals:reject', 'approvals', 'reject', 'Reject Requests', 'Reject pending requests', 'Approvals'),
('approvals:send_back', 'approvals', 'send_back', 'Send Back Requests', 'Send requests back for clarification', 'Approvals'),
('approvals:delegate', 'approvals', 'delegate', 'Delegate Approvals', 'Delegate approval authority', 'Approvals'),

-- Workflows
('workflows:view', 'workflows', 'view', 'View Workflows', 'View workflow configurations', 'Workflows'),
('workflows:create', 'workflows', 'create', 'Create Workflows', 'Create new workflows', 'Workflows'),
('workflows:edit', 'workflows', 'edit', 'Edit Workflows', 'Edit workflow configurations', 'Workflows'),
('workflows:delete', 'workflows', 'delete', 'Delete Workflows', 'Delete workflows', 'Workflows'),

-- Sites & Zones
('sites:view', 'sites', 'view', 'View Sites', 'View site list and details', 'Sites'),
('sites:manage', 'sites', 'manage', 'Manage Sites', 'Create/edit/delete sites', 'Sites'),
('zones:view', 'zones', 'view', 'View Zones', 'View zone list and details', 'Zones'),
('zones:manage', 'zones', 'manage', 'Manage Zones', 'Create/edit/delete zones', 'Zones'),

-- Settings
('settings:view', 'settings', 'view', 'View Settings', 'View system settings', 'Settings'),
('settings:edit', 'settings', 'edit', 'Edit Settings', 'Modify system settings', 'Settings'),
('settings:master_data', 'settings', 'master_data', 'Manage Master Data', 'Manage lookup tables and master data', 'Settings'),

-- Reports
('reports:view', 'reports', 'view', 'View Reports', 'Access to reports', 'Reports'),
('reports:export', 'reports', 'export', 'Export Reports', 'Export reports to Excel/PDF', 'Reports'),

-- Audit
('audit:view', 'audit', 'view', 'View Audit Logs', 'Access to audit trail', 'Audit'),
('audit:export', 'audit', 'export', 'Export Audit Logs', 'Export audit logs', 'Audit')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);
